task_description: Create and save a new task titled "REVIEW THE WORDS" with the description "REWIEW WORDS" in a calendar.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the purple underlined search result title text reading "Google Calendar - Easier Time Management, Appointments ...". In the full-screen view, this is the top Google search result on a Google results page for "google calendar" in Chrome, with the Google Calendar site URL shown above it and other related results listed below.
caption.action: Click the top search result title "Google Calendar - Easier Time Management, Appointments ...".
caption.expectation: The browser should open the Google Calendar website from the search results.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the rounded light-gray "创建" button with a plus symbol on its left, indicating the target is that create control. In the full-screen view, this is the Google Calendar interface in Chrome, with a left sidebar mini calendar and calendars list, and the main weekly calendar grid displayed for late March to early April 2026. The target is a UI control in the left sidebar near the top.
caption.action: Click the "创建" button in the left sidebar.
caption.expectation: A creation menu or event creation panel should open, allowing the user to start adding a new calendar item.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a dropdown menu opened from the "创建" button, with three stacked options: "活动", "任务", and "预约安排". The semitransparent red X is centered on the middle option labeled "任务", indicating the target is that menu item. In the full-screen view, this is Google Calendar in Chrome showing a weekly calendar grid for late March to early April 2026, with the left sidebar open and the create menu expanded over the mini calendar area.
caption.action: Click the "任务" option in the create dropdown menu.
caption.expectation: The menu should close and Google Calendar should open the task creation interface, such as a task editor or a new task panel/dialog.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in view shows a Google Calendar task creation dialog with the title field active at the top, containing the text "REVIEW THE WOR" with a text cursor at the end, indicating task title text is being entered and the visible content is still being completed rather than replaced. Tabs below read "活动", "任务", and "预约安排", with "任务" selected. The full screen shows Google Calendar in a weekly view for late March to early April 2026, with the task editor open over the calendar grid and a blue "保存" button at the bottom of the dialog.
caption.action: Type "REVIEW THE WORDS" into the task title field, continuing the current title text entry.
caption.expectation: The task title field should display the completed text "REVIEW THE WORDS", ready for saving or adding more task details.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a large plain gray rectangular area inside the Google Calendar task editor, with a semitransparent red X centered on that empty field. This region corresponds to the description box under the row labeled "添加说明". In the full-screen view, a task creation dialog is open over the weekly calendar; the title reads "REVIEW THE WORDS", the "任务" tab is selected, the time is set for March 31 from 下午9:00 to 下午10:00, and the blue "保存" button is visible at the bottom. The click target is a blank editable region within the dialog rather than a toolbar control.
caption.action: Click the empty description field under "添加说明" in the task editor.
caption.expectation: The description area should become active with a text cursor, entering edit mode so details can be typed into the task.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop centers on the task editor’s multiline text field beneath the row labeled "添加截止时间". The field is active with a blue underline and already contains the partial text "REVIEW WOR", with the text cursor at the end, indicating text is being appended in the existing description/details area rather than clicking a new control. In the full-screen view, Google Calendar is open in week view with a task dialog titled "REVIEW THE WORDS" on the left, the "任务" tab selected, the time set for March 31 from 下午9:00 to 下午10:00, and the blue "保存" button visible at the bottom.
caption.action: Type "REWIEW WORDS" into the active details field, appending to the current text.
caption.expectation: The typed text should appear in the active text area after the existing content, and the insertion cursor should remain in the field ready for more editing.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a rounded blue button at the bottom-right corner of the Google Calendar task dialog, with white Chinese text "保存" and a semitransparent red X centered directly on it. This is a UI control button, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, the task editor dialog is open over the weekly calendar, showing the task title "REVIEW THE WORDS," the task tab selected, the time set for March 31 from 下午9:00 to 下午10:00, and the description field filled; the blue save button is the final confirmation control in the dialog.
caption.action: Click the blue "保存" button in the task dialog.
caption.expectation: The task dialog should close and the new task should be saved to the calendar, appearing in the time slot on the calendar grid.
